prompt:
Portrait shot on 85mm f/1.4, three-quarter body editorial portrait of a Japanese woman in her late 20s, dark loosely pulled-back hair, quiet composed angular face, gaze directed toward rain-streaked window frame, no emotion visible. She wears a dark charcoal oversized blazer, white inner visible at chest, one hand raised near face.

Upper body slightly pulled back to show more of the figure, seated at a dark wood table in dim moody interior, open book and ashtray in foreground as props, warm dim light in background, editorial composition.

Warm amber low-key interior light from background pendant lamp, subject's face lit partially by cool window light, two-source mood, chiaroscuro balance.

Photographic texture and quality: ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, skin subsurface scattering subtle, photographic texture not CG render smoothness, subtle stray hairs from pulled-back style, warm-cool color contrast preserved.

Avoid: AI-smooth skin, bright lighting, overly stylized retouching.

--ar 3:4
